treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Multiple medications including Alendronate, Dipyridamole-Aspirin, Ezetimibe, Insulin, Isosorbide Mononitrate, etc.
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient was alert and interactive upon discharge; no acute distress noted.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with syncope and increased left sided weakness.
MRI conducted; negative for a new stroke.
Patient received extensive monitoring and evaluation including ECG and heart monitoring.
Physical therapy evaluated patient; deemed safe to return home.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with doctors as per the discharge instructions.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient was able to return home with physical therapy.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient expressed no immediate complaints upon discharge.
